response:
MCP Risk (M0-M5):
read_issue → M2, create_issue → M4, list_repos → M2, merge_pr → M5, delete_branch → M5, update_protected_branch → M5.
Additional risks: third-party source untrusted, no permission manifest, no audit logging, M5 tools with no human approval.
Recommend: prohibit connection. If needed: permission manifest + M5 human approval + audit + source review.
Status: PASS. 3 M5 tools identified, missing manifest flagged, connection not recommended.
